symbols.name: PostgresIdempotentMigrationsSqlGenerator
symbols.summary: A custom PostgreSQL Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Migrations.MigrationsSqlGenerator that emits idempotent DDL statements using native IF [NOT] EXISTS clauses or DO $$ BEGIN ... END $$; blocks.
